titleStmt.title: SII 11.62: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 62. (B.K. No. 80 of 1928-29). HEGGŪR, BILGI PETHA, BIJAPUR DISTRICT. ON A MUTILATED STONE SET UP NEAR THE TEMPLE OF ĪŚVARA.

summary.p: The inscription belongs to the reign of Jagadēkamalladēva (I) and registers a gift of 24 mattar of land made by Mahāsāmanta Āytavarmarasa of the Raṇamūrkha family to the temple of Re[bba]lēśvara at Pergguṟuva (the modern Heggūr). Of these, eighteen mattar were meant for expenses of education and six for the benefit of the deity.
The record is dated Śaka 94[6], Raktākshin, Pushya, śu. 7, Thursday, Uttarāyaṇasaṅkrānti which corresponds to A.D. 1024, December 24, Thursday (śu. 7 being evidently a mistake for ba. 7).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī prithvīvallabha mahārājādhirājaṁ
paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābha
raṇaṁ śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyābhivṛddhiprava
rddhamāna(ṁ) mācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajī
vi samadhigatapa(ṁ)ñcamahāśabda mahāsāmantaṁ ripubaḷakritāntaṁ raṇamūrkhkha
vaṁśōdbhavaṁ siṅganabaṁṭaṁ śrīmadāytavarmmarasaṁ sakavarṣa 946 neya raktā
kṣisaṁvatsarada puśya suddha 7 mi brihaspativāra duttarāyaṇa saṁ
krāṁntiyoḷ Ī pergguṟuvada rebbalēśvarakke biṭṭa bhūmi matta 24 A
daṟoḷage śrīmat vādighaṁṭadēvadattapa(ṁ)ṇḍitara vidyādānada ke
yi matta 18 dēvarige matta 6 [.] svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti
vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvariṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kri
miḥ . Ida naḍeyisidaṁ ganaṁntapuṇya mida naḷidaṁ bāṇarāsiyo
ḷu pannirccāsira brāhmaṇaruma nekkōṭi tapōdhanarumaṁ sahaśra kavi
ḷeyumaṁ naḷidaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 11.62 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
